destinations.name: Vietnam
destinations.description: From the emerald waters of Ha Long Bay to the ancient streets of Hoi An, Vietnam offers a rich tapestry of culture, cuisine, and natural beauty that captivates every traveler.

regions.name: Northern Vietnam
regions.description: Home to Hanoi, Ha Long Bay, and the stunning rice terraces of Sapa.

regions.name: Central Vietnam
regions.description: UNESCO heritage sites, pristine beaches, and the imperial city of Hue.

regions.name: Southern Vietnam
regions.description: Vibrant Ho Chi Minh City and the lush waterways of the Mekong Delta.

destinations.name: Thailand
destinations.description: Thailand blends ancient temples, tropical beaches, and vibrant street life into an unforgettable Southeast Asian experience.

destinations.name: Cambodia
destinations.description: Discover the magnificent temples of Angkor and the warm hospitality of the Cambodian people.

destinations.name: Laos
destinations.description: Laos offers serene Buddhist temples, dramatic landscapes, and a pace of life that invites you to slow down.

destinations.name: Japan
destinations.description: From ancient shrines to neon-lit streets, Japan is a fascinating blend of tradition and cutting-edge modernity.
